feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Build apps backend session not released
entry.content:
Hi

We have conenected Build apps to S4 backend vua BTP, SCC and Gateway OData service

When App is openened in "Preview" mode, it creates 7 dialogue sessions in the backened

Also when the App/browser is closed, backend session is not released in S4

Anyone faced this issue

Regards

MB

entry.title: SAP Build Apps: App doesnt get user information
entry.content:
Hi,

i have a problem with the system variable "systemVars.currentUser.email" (also the other ones like firstname or lastname) which reads the mail from the currently logged in user.
Its working on the preview app for one time, but after reloading the page, the variable is empty.

When I deploy the app and use it, it's empty everytime. 

In the developer tools from Chrome I can see, that this user API is triggered: /user-api/currentUser/
The query works and it returns my name, mail and some other information, but the systemvar variable is still empty.

Can somebody help me here?

Thanks,
Vincent

entry.title: How to create authentication(Sign up and login page) page in sap build apps ?
entry.content: I am creating an app using sap build apps. How can i create register and login page? In appgyver we have firebase. But for build apps is there any way?

entry.title: SAP BPA - Error in executing the action in Process flow
entry.content:
HI SAP BPA Community,

I am getting the below error while trying to execute the action in the process flow in BPA. I am connecting to S/4 HANA on-premise system and when I am executing the action from Action editor using the same Destination, it is working fine. I was not getting this error 1-2 months back when I was using the same destination.

I have already seen the below post but did not the solution.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/sap-build-process-automation-problem-with-post-action-and-csrf-token/qaq-p/12723297 

The action is calling a custom OData from backend S/4 on premise system. Connection test is working from cloud connector, BTP cockpit and Action editor. But not working in Process flow.

"Perform ExchangeRate Entry" failed
Error message: Action 'b1790140-ffdf-4e89-966d-d98d5afa1f3a' failed with the following error: 'Error thrown from action runtime library: Failed to read sap.lcnc.fetchXcsrf flag from destination configuration : Could not fetch client credentials token for service of type "destination".'.
Log ID: 2b9789ea-338e-4104-a000-e974c88-us10

@Archana SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: Open excel instance activity of SAP Build Process Automation is inactive.
entry.content:
I am using a Mac with desktop agent version 3.25.43. While creating projects in my system, I am not able to use the excel related activities. I have the Excel SDK added in dependencies as well. My excel version is 16.83. Is there something else I need to add, or is this problem related to the Excel version causing the activities to not work?

Regards,

Remya

entry.title: SAP Build App After Deployed into BTP getting Error while Open App Error GET --500 Missing zone info
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have SAP Build App trial version and create application and deploy into SAP BTP and successfully deployed into SAP BTP and display as HTML5 Application.

While Click on that App system is open into New browser but getting error as below

GET request to /buildappsXXXXX.buildappsXXXXX-1.2.1/index.html completed with status 500 Missing zone information

 

Kindly help me what is missing in SAP BTP, or SAP Build App. I can able to preview the application in SAP Build App but not after the Deployment into SAP BTP.

Thanks in Advance.
Regards,
Mithun

entry.title: In Build Code, Joule throws error message exceeded the AI usage
entry.content:
Hello All,

While trying to generate Entity and Services using Joule, I have keyed the below text:

"Create Entity :MyCars" and services "MyCars" based on the below fields with type string: ConditionType, PostalCode,E ntitlementGroup, ConditionRecord, VAKEY_LONG, S4TableName, S4TablePrefix, CustomerID, ProductClass, SalesOrg, Division, Channel, Plant, ShippingPoint, DestinationZone, SatelliteLocation, Incoterms, Incoterms2, Amount, Unit, UoM, ValidFrom, ValidTo, ValidFromDate, ValidToDate, WillCallRate, DateTimeReceived, IsValidRecord, ScaleQuantity, Per, ScaleLineNumber, ScaleAmount, ScaleIndicator, PriceSegment"

I receive the error message: Cannot generate the requested code as you have exceeded the AI usage.

What is the span of this usage and how many times it can be used? 

Thanks

Srihari

entry.title: How to develop Customer Creation Application in SAP using SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Objective: -

Implementing SAP OData URI  to SAP Build and Creating Customers in SAP BUILD which can replicate to SAP System

 

Business Scenario: -

 How to create Customers using SAP Build Apps and OData Service.

 

Prerequisites: -

-> You Have an SAP BTP account or trial account.

-> Inside the BTP account, go to Instances and Subscriptions and create an instance of SAP Build Apps

-> Now go to Security -> Users Tab and assign Role to the user for SAP BUILD Apps

 

Now, we have to create the SAP Backend connection to SAP BTP : -

Before mapping data from S4H or our SAP System to Build Apps, we need to create a Destination in the BTP and give the required details of the S4H system with ODATA Uri too which we will consume (BTP->Connectivity->Destination )

 

 

Connection is now established to that service.

 

 

Now go to SAP Build Apps and navigate to Create to create a project.

 

 

Now click on Build an Application to create a Application

 

Now Click on Web & Mobile Application

 

 

Now Give the project name and Description and You are good to go.

Inside the app you are working on SAP Build App go to the Authentication section and implement authentication

Now create an App Variable that holds all fields that are present in our OData service.

Now create a page and install a template from the marketplace which is Basic List and implement your UI for Customer Creation and a home page where all customers are displayed.

Now go to the DATA Section then go to SAP Systems and connect to your s4h System and the service that you called from the destination  from SAP BTP will be available to you now.

 

Now Click on this list go to ‘list resource’ fill in all the fields and configure authentication from Properties

Now Go to the Logic section of List and implement logic like this

 

Now click on the Create button go to Show logic for Button then implement this logic

 

Now create another page as shown below and build a form to create Customer Data using input fields.

 

Now do data binding to all fields by clicking on it and then assigning value to it

 

Now do a similar mapping for every field

Also, implement a condition to alert that an empty value is not allowed.

Now on the submit button implement logic that submit the data and updates the data to that OData service and thus will be reflected in the database table too

Preview Your Developments: -

Now when everything is done go to the Launch section then Preview your app.

 

By this, we can preview our application either on the web or can be previewed in Smartphones.

Our Application Now looks like-

When we click on the create button the second page appears

 

Fill out details and now our customer is created.

So now your customer is created in your database table  which you can check by going to se11->KNA1

And you can see your entry got updated in table KNA1

entry.title: Cannot recreate SAP build app
entry.content:
Hi Guys 

I was a souscription on SAP build app and was an  access issue to modifies something , for that a deleted souscription .

I try to recreate a souscription but not possible , i get this error

 

To subscribe this application link an Identity Authentication tenant to the subaccount with the "Establish Trust" option. For more information: 

Error Code: 422

entry.title: SAP Build Apps - Deployed HTML5 Web App
entry.content:
Hello,

I have been constantly having issues with SAP Build Apps deployed apps. Just a few weeks ago, my deployed apps were not working, I was getting the error "Internal Server Error - 500", saying that the GET request to the app destination had missing zone information.

Then, suddenly the apps started working, and were working properly for a couple of weeks. Now, I am getting again the "Internal Server Error", but with the following details:

Failed to exchange login token by an XSUAA token undefined

Does anyone know if there is an issue with the service?

Thanks.

entry.title: Hello, can you please help me in getting logged in user Info UI integration cards in sap build
entry.content: Hello, can you please help me in getting logged in user Info in UI integration cards in sap build.

entry.title: "Not all conditions are fulfilled to generate a package." SAP Build Error
entry.content:
Hello Builders,

I am wondering how to get past the following error in SAP Build Process Automation?

"Not all conditions are fulfilled to generate a package.
You cannot create a new artifact of type datatype, because you already have 24. You've reached the maximum number specified in the quotas (20)."

This is a screenshot of the error message:

I received this error while setting up the Process Automation template "Manage Invoices without Purchase Order." This error message does not appear when I try to create a new artifact, but rather when attempting to release the project. All the data types in the template are already created and there are 24 of them. I have released this template before and have not had this issue. 

Any suggestions or hypothesis will be appreciated.

Thank you,

Julien

entry.title: Re: iOS Distribution Certificate e Keystore Error
entry.content:
Guys, it appears that the problem has been fixed.

For me, as I created all the credentials correctly, both for iOS and Android, the compilation generated the .ipa (For iOS) and the apk (For Android) normally and without any errors.

entry.title: Do we have any certification related to SAP build (covering build process automation)?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I can see that the citizen developer (LCNC) certification that was available before is not active at the moment. Do we have anything else available except C_WZADM_01?

entry.title: Unable to change flow line while designing a business process in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello All,

    I am currently designing a business process utilizing SAP Build Process Automation in my BTP Trial Tenant. I am defining a condition where I want a flow line to be changed. However, I am unable to select or edit a flow line. I am not sure, if its an issue with the editor. 

Please check the attached screenshot below and provide guidance.

Thanks and Regards,

     Abhijeet

entry.title: SAP Build process Automation - Document Extraction Service: Missing Rights?
entry.content:
Hi there,

I am currently trying to Automate a process using the Build Process Automation Service. I was planning to use the Document Information Extraction Service in this Automation, but for some reason it doesn't show up if I am looking for it. 

Normally I should be able to select "Document Template" but if I use the Build Process Automation Service, its just not there.

 

Same thing here: I should be able to use an "Extract Data" Activity, but it's not there: 

I assume its because of missing rights, but I don't know which rights could be missing. I am able to use the Document Extraction Service in the BTP, but not inside SAP Build

 

Does anyone know what might be the reason for all of this? Thank you!

Julian

Edit: If I try to run an imported project with an "Extract data"-Action I get this Error:

 

 

 
{
    "uid": "XXXX",
    "name": "Extract Invoice Data",
    "type": "automation",
    "instanceUid": "XXXX",
    "packageUid": "XXXX",
    "packageVersionUid": "XXXX",
    "attended": true,
    "duration": 1,
    "status": "Failed",
    "code": "KO",
    "label": "[requestDoxToken] Error on content received: {\"name\":\"requestDoxToken\",\"tid\":86,\"code\":\"InvalidCommand\",\"label\":\"No bean named 'requestDoxToken' available\"}",
    "exception": "irpa_core.error.Error",
    "stack": "Error: [requestDoxToken] Error on content received: {\"name\":\"requestDoxToken\",\"tid\":86,\"code\":\"InvalidCommand\",\"label\":\"No bean named 'requestDoxToken' available\"}\n    at C:\\Users\\I7XXXX   at o.receiveMessage (C:\\Users\\I7XXXX    at c (C:\\Users\\I7XXXX    at u (C:\\Users\\IXXX    at l (C:\\Users\\I7XXXX    at C:\\Users\\I74XXXX    at o.p [as onEvent] (C:\\Users\\I7XXXX    at process.<anonymous> (C:\\Users\\I7XXXX    at process.emit (node:events:513:28)\n    at emit (node:internal/child_process:937:14)"
}
 
XXXX means real content substituted with "XXXX"

entry.title: Transporting SAP Build Process Automation Projects
entry.content:
Hi,

Customer currently doesn't have SAP CTMS nor SAP Content Agent Service as part of current landscape and looking for whether or not to proceed with using SAP Build Process Automation and building solutions.

Referring to help.sap document contents - Is CTMS and Content Agent Service mandatory for transporting to another sub account BPA tenant (https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/promoting-projects) or manual via export to local system and import into Build Lobby (https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/manage-project-across-tenants) and deploy feasible as a manual transport mechanism without CTMS or Content Agent Service to higher environment tenants?


How about Action projects ? 

Pls advise.

 

Regards,

Vipin.

entry.title: Change field in Form SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Community!

Can I use the Forms in SAP Build Process Automation not only to approve but also change and add values?

The new value would be the output of the form.

Or is there any other function for that?

Basically, I want to give the user a chance to change the value, e.g. of the amount.

SAP Build SAP Build Process Automation SAP Business Technology Platform 

I guess its an easy one for you @Dan_Wroblewski

entry.title: SAP BUILD deployment to production
entry.content:
Hello Fellow builders,

I have a very generic question regarding SAP build deployments to production. We have built an application in Dev system and in coming future will be moving it to Production.

The usual process is to export the build application and then upload it in the target system instance. In my understanding, this can be considered okay for initial deployment. But then for all the after go-live bugfixes, which are not that big version in itself, how do we move them to production? Do we have to still follow the Export-Import method or is there any other method to do that?

Please suggest. Happy friday!! @Dan_Wroblewski @eshrinivasan 

Regards,

Yogesh

entry.title: Not able to do build in sap build apps
entry.content:
Runtime version: 4.9.218; AB version: 2.3.0COMMAND:
NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=16000  npxrnv export -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.218 -r
FAILED with ERROR:
Command failed with exit code 1: npx rnv export -p android -s standalone -c standalone --ci --yes --skipRnvCheck --packageManager yarn --template @sapappgyver/orchestra-template-standalone@4.9.218 -r
